/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc ../../lib/libopencv_imgcodecs460.a CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/loadsave.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/utils.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_base.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_bmp.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_exr.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_gdal.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_gdcm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_hdr.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_jpeg.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_jpeg2000.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_jpeg2000_openjpeg.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_pam.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_pfm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_png.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_pxm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_sunras.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_tiff.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/grfmt_webp.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/bitstrm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/rgbe.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_imgcodecs.dir/src/exif.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib ../../lib/libopencv_imgcodecs460.a
